reviews.comment:
Muy atentos los playeros y playeras, muy buena  atención y excelente el aseo de los baños!!!

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very attentive, the service was excellent, and the restrooms were spotless!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205ak1FaDNWa0pvZEd0UGFXTTRVVE5rWWtadFpFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Impecable todo!!servicio atencion y eficacia!!como funcionan en general las YPF /ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was impeccable!! Excellent service, attention, and efficiency!! Just like YPF/ACA stations generally are.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1blVVUjZObXN5WlVSMGIxVmFVbGMyTVMxSGFGRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad no tuvimos buena experiencia, floja la atención por parte del personal de despacho de combustible y del autoservicio, no tenían ganas de atender, siendo socios de ACA y estando en viaje nos negaron el uso del sanitario entre otras cosas.  Algo básico y de primera necesidad.

(Translated by Google)
To be honest, we didn't have a good experience. The service from the fuel station and self-service staff was poor; they didn't seem inclined to help. Even though we were ACA members and traveling, they denied us the use of the restroom, among other things. Something basic and essential.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pSelVYUlRRbUU1WWw5YVQyUTFTMmR1VW1weVgxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los y las empleadas, tanto playeros como buffet, estacionamiento y administración. Muy responsables de la seguridad. Impecable higiene.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all employees, including beach staff, buffet staff, parking attendants, and management. Very responsible regarding security. Impeccable hygiene.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xNdGRFZFJVMVV6YkZCNWNFTkZWazFPU0RONlRXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Casi siempre me atiende el mismo playero, va a pensar que ya le tomé los horarios jajaaj buena atención todos

(Translated by Google)
I almost always get served by the same attendant; he's going to think I've got his schedule down, haha. Good service all around.
